# Golang Install Submodule (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/golang/install`.

## Docs

- [Install Overview](./install.mdx): Cross-platform Go installation overview with RPress Tabs and Badge components. Includes platform selection cards and user-level guidance.
- [Install on Windows](./windows.mdx): Windows installation methods (MSI, Chocolatey, Scoop, ZIP, goup) with interactive Tabs and difficulty badges.
- [Install on macOS](./macos.mdx): macOS installation methods (PKG, Homebrew, goup, source) with interactive Tabs and difficulty badges.
- [Install on Linux](./linux.mdx): Linux installation methods (binary, apt, yum, snap, goup) with interactive Tabs and difficulty badges.
- [Install Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for installation pages.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this install directory.

## Design Notes

All installation guides use RPress components:
- **Tabs**: Switch between installation methods
- **Badge**: Mark difficulty levels and recommendations
- **Card**: Platform selection overview
- User levels: Beginner (tip), Developer (info), Intermediate (warning), Advanced (warning outline), Enterprise (danger)
